title: Lydia H. Sigourney
content:
She sang alone, ere womanhood had known
    The gift of song which fills the air to-day
    Tender and sweet, a music all her own
    May fitly linger where she knelt to pray
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, John Greenleaf Whittier delivers a powerful performance in "Lydia H. Sigourney"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
